title: Junior Frontend Developer at Swiggy Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at Swiggy Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
We at Swiggy Digital Technologies are looking for an experienced Frontend Developer based out of Srinagar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Swiggy Digital Technologies:
Swiggy Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Swiggy Digital Technologies!
